base_query: ("before and after" OR "pre-post" OR baseline OR "follow-up evaluation" OR "post-implementation" OR "pre-intervention" OR "pilot evaluation" OR "trial results showed" OR "follow up study" OR "outcome measurement" OR "study finds") AND (mandated OR trialled OR launched OR "scale up" OR "decided to" OR "will introduce" OR introduced OR "plans to" OR rollout OR implemented OR "rolled out" OR pilot) AND NOT (sentencing OR prosecution OR defendant OR verdict OR convicted OR charged OR magistrate OR "crown court" OR jury OR appeal OR tournament OR championship OR "premier league" OR goal OR coach OR match OR album OR film OR theatre OR premiere OR "box office" OR "randomised controlled trial" OR "randomized controlled trial" OR "randomised control trial" OR "randomized control trial" OR "control group" OR "randomly assigned" OR placebo OR "clinical trials" OR "randomised controlled trial" OR "randomized controlled trial" OR RCT)
